headline: Elon Musk, Walmart Heirs See Q1 Wealth Gains: Bezos, Ellison, Zuckerberg & Others Hit By Stock Losses
summary: For each of the past two years, the top 10 billionaires globally have added at least $500 billion to their combined net wealth totals. It will take a significant turnaround in 2026 for the 10 richest to add those kind of gains, with seven of the 10 richest losing net worth in the first quarter and the overall top 10 leaderboard posting a loss. Top 10 Richest Billionaires Q1 Scorecard With Magnificent Seven stocks and the overall stock market facing heightened volatility and geopolitical concerns
